turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hello. Mujhe yeh jaanna tha ki aapka clinic Pune mein kaun si bus routes se accessible hai.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Ji zaroor. Humara clinic Baner Road pe hai. PMPML ki route number 155 aur 199 yahan se guzarti hain. Nearest bus stop Balewadi Phata hai, wahan se 5 minute ki walk hai.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Auto ya rickshaw milti hai wahan se?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Haan, Balewadi Phata pe autorickshaw easily milti hai. Cab service bhi aati hai directly clinic tak. Hum Google Maps pe bhi listed hain — Sunrise Multispeciality Clinic search karein.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Achha, ek aur cheez — lift hai andar ya sirf stairs?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Hamare paas elevator hai. Differently-abled patients ke liye ramp bhi available hai ground floor pe.
